name: add_flutter_state_management
avoid: do not mix multiple state libraries
brief_template:
To add state management in Flutter:
1. Choose library: Provider, Riverpod, Bloc, or GetX
2. Add dependency to pubspec.yaml
3. Create models in lib/models/
4. Create state class (ChangeNotifier, Bloc, or StateNotifier)
5. Wrap app with provider/bloc at main.dart
6. Consume state in widgets with context.watch / BlocBuilder
